chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 463 of 2005 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.2017/2022 20.01.2023 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Through instant application, the applicant/surety, namely, Pir Bux S/o Mawali Rajri, seeks return of his surety document furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears from the record that accused, namely, Ghulam Rasool, Izzat, Faiq and Mero were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 26.09.2005, whereas, the applicant had stood surety on behalf of the said accused persons by depositing solvency certificate No.80 dated 10.10.2005 issued by Mukhitarkar (Revenue), Taluka Ubauro. Thereafter, the bail application was ultimately dismissed vide order dated 15.12.2005. Consequently, the bail bonds of the accused were cancelled and interim bail earlier granted to them was recalled. Learned Additional P.G. for the State records no objection for return of the surety document. The Accountant of this Court has also filed report dated 30.05.2022. In view of above, the listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document as furnished before the Additional Registrar of this Court to the applicant/surety after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
